Issue 1 - Upstream Titer.finding: Titer range 0.090 g/L with all params, 0.116 g/L without hydrophobicity
Issue 1 - Upstream Titer.root_cause: Sequence-dependent modulation adds only ±3-5% variation; hydrophobicity must be explicitly passed
Issue 1 - Upstream Titer.recommendation: Always pass hydrophobicity/GRAVY to upstream twin; consider widening modulation coefficients

Issue 2 - Immunogenicity.root_cause: humanization_score=1.0 for all fully human mAbs zeros out 20% of the scoring weight
Issue 2 - Immunogenicity.recommendation: Add germline-distance scoring for CDR regions; different CDR3 sequences should yield different humanization scores

Issue 3 - Glycan Profile.root_cause: This is scientifically reasonable — canonical IgG1s in standard CHO should have similar glycan profiles
Issue 3 - Glycan Profile.recommendation: No change needed. Document as expected behavior.

Issue 4 - GOV-5 cIEF Sum.finding: NISTmAb cIEF sums correctly (100.0%), but cief_sum field was missing from JSON
Issue 4 - GOV-5 cIEF Sum.root_cause: Data collection bug in v35 validation script — NISTmAb was stored differently
Issue 4 - GOV-5 cIEF Sum.recommendation: Fixed in updated JSON. Not a platform issue.

Issue 5 - GOV-7 MW Mismatch.finding: scFv report has MW mismatch between context and molecule_overview
Issue 5 - GOV-7 MW Mismatch.root_cause: report_assembler uses different MW calculation paths for non-IgG formats
Issue 5 - GOV-7 MW Mismatch.recommendation: Ensure single source of truth for MW in report_assembler
